tools.name: Todoist
tools.description: The smart task list that keeps your whole life in sync.
tools.longDescription: Todoist is the task management app that helps you organize everything from big projects to small errands. With natural language input, recurring due dates, and cross-platform sync, you'll never miss a beat.

tools.name: Notion
tools.description: Your flexible workspace for notes, wikis, and everything in between.
tools.longDescription: Notion combines notes, tasks, wikis, and databases into a single, flexible workspace. Build custom workflows for your team or personal knowledge management with powerful block-based editing.

tools.name: Linear
tools.description: The beautifully fast issue tracker your team will actually enjoy using.
tools.longDescription: Linear is the issue tracker that software teams actually look forward to opening. Keyboard-first, beautifully minimal, and blazing fast. Track issues, manage sprints, and ship with clarity — not clutter.

tools.name: Headspace
tools.description: Mindfulness made simple — for beginners and seasoned meditators alike.
tools.longDescription: Headspace makes meditation simple. Get guided sessions for sleep, focus, stress, and anxiety — all led by world-class experts. Hundreds of exercises designed to train your mind like a muscle.

tools.name: MyFitnessPal
tools.description: Your daily companion for nutrition, exercise, and healthier habits.
tools.longDescription: MyFitnessPal is the world's most popular nutrition tracker — and for good reason. Log meals from a database of 14 million foods, scan barcodes in seconds, and sync with your favourite fitness devices. It's not just about calories. It's about building habits that last.

tools.name: Sleep Cycle
tools.description: Wake up naturally, at the perfect moment in your sleep cycle.
tools.longDescription: Sleep Cycle analyzes your sleep patterns using your phone's microphone and accelerometer, waking you during light sleep so you feel refreshed. Get detailed insights into your sleep quality every night.

tools.name: YNAB
tools.description: Take control of your money with the budgeting method that actually works.
tools.longDescription: You Need A Budget helps you take control of your money with the four rules: assign every dollar a job, embrace your true expenses, roll with the punches, and age your money. Join over 3 million people who budget the happy way.

tools.name: Splitwise
tools.description: Split bills, track IOUs, and keep group finances fair.
tools.longDescription: Splitwise simplifies splitting bills with roommates, friends, and family. Track who owes what, get reminders to settle up, and export to spreadsheets. Supports 130+ currencies and 8 languages.

tools.name: Personal Capital
tools.description: See your full financial picture — net worth, investments, and retirement.
tools.longDescription: Personal Capital gives you a complete picture of your finances — for free. See your net worth at a glance, track your investments, plan for retirement, and get personalised advice when you're ready. It's like a financial dashboard with a co-pilot.

tools.name: Beeper
tools.description: Every chat app, one inbox. No more switching tabs.
tools.longDescription: Beeper unifies 15+ chat networks into one gorgeous app. WhatsApp, Signal, Telegram, Slack, Discord, iMessage — all in one place, all searchable, all yours. No more bouncing between apps. No more missed messages.

tools.name: Twist
tools.description: Thoughtful communication for teams that value focused work.
tools.longDescription: Twist is built for teams who value deep focus over constant notifications. Channels keep conversations organised, threads stay threaded (no chaos), and do-not-disturb mode actually works. It's calm, intentional communication.

tools.name: Clubhouse
tools.description: Live audio rooms where interesting conversations happen every day.
tools.longDescription: Clubhouse brings the magic of live, unscripted conversation to your phone. Drop into rooms hosted by fascinating people on any topic — speak on stage or just listen. It's social audio that feels human, spontaneous, and alive.

tools.name: Duolingo
tools.description: Learn a language through play — free, fun, and surprisingly effective.
tools.longDescription: Duolingo makes language learning feel like a game. Short, bite-sized lessons adapt to your learning style, AI-powered explanations fix mistakes instantly, and streaks keep you motivated. 40+ languages available.

tools.name: Khan Academy
tools.description: A free education for everyone. Math, science, history — taught at your pace.
tools.longDescription: Khan Academy offers free lessons in math, science, economics, history, and more — all mapped to standards and taught through videos, articles, and thousands of practice problems with instant feedback.

tools.name: Anki
tools.description: Master anything with flashcards that know when you're about to forget.
tools.longDescription: Anki uses spaced repetition to help you memorize anything efficiently. Create flashcard decks with text, images, and audio. Synced across all your devices. Used by medical students, pilots, and lifelong learners.

tools.name: Spotify
tools.description: Every song, every podcast, every mood — all in one place.
tools.longDescription: Spotify gives you access to over 100 million songs and 5 million podcasts. Discover new music with AI-powered recommendations, build collaborative playlists, and listen anywhere with offline mode.

tools.name: Kindle
tools.description: Your library, lighter than a single paperback.
tools.longDescription: Kindle lets you read millions of books, newspapers, and magazines on a device built for readers. Adjustable fonts, weeks of battery life, and no glare in sunlight. Your entire library in your pocket.

tools.name: Letterboxd
tools.description: Track, review, and discover films with a community that loves cinema.
tools.longDescription: Letterboxd is where film lovers track what they watch, write reviews, create lists, and connect with other cinephiles. Browse the collections of tastemakers, follow friends, and discover your next favorite movie.
